description: Priority 6 - Add test coverage for money-handling and auth paths. Unit tests for order-checkout, distance, and rate-limit. Playwright specs for checkout flow and delivery OTP login.
steps: 1. Create tests/order-checkout.test.ts: Unit tests for lib/order-checkout.ts covering server-side price recalculation. Test cases: (a) correct subtotal calculation, (b) promo code discount applied correctly, (c) loyalty points redemption capped at max percent, (d) wallet deduction logic, (e) out-of-stock error, (f) minimum order value enforcement. Since Prisma requires a DB, mock prisma calls or test the pure calculation logic extracted into testable functions.

2. Create tests/distance.test.ts: Unit tests for lib/distance.ts covering: (a) calculateDistanceKm returns correct Haversine distance for known coordinates, (b) isWithinDeliveryRadius returns true for 4km and false for 6km from store, (c) edge cases (same point = 0km, antipodal points).

3. Create tests/distributed-rate-limit.test.ts: Unit tests for lib/distributed-rate-limit.ts covering: (a) local fallback is used when UPSTASH env vars are missing, (b) hashRateLimitKey produces consistent SHA-256 hashes, (c) rateLimitResponse returns correct status codes and headers.

4. Create tests/ui/checkout.spec.ts: Playwright spec for the full checkout flow covering COD, UPI, and Wallet payment methods. Include a test case that verifies server-authoritative pricing (i.e., a tampered client-side price in cart is rejected/ignored by the server).
5. Create tests/ui/delivery-login.spec.ts: Playwright spec for the delivery partner OTP login flow at /delivery/login.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test passes with new unit tests for distance.ts and distributed-rate-limit.ts
tests/order-checkout.test.ts exists and covers pricing logic
tests/distance.test.ts proves the 5km gate works correctly
tests/ui/checkout.spec.ts covers checkout with proof that tampered prices are rejected
